courseGroups.name: Discipline Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete 60 discipline-course credits, including at least 24 credits (four 6-credit courses) tagged for the Cyber Security Stream. Up to 12 credits may instead come from approved postgraduate courses offered by departments in the Faculty of Engineering or the School of Computing and Data Science; those external approvals require manual audit review.

courses.name: Machine learning in trading and finance
Banking in Web3 – Metaverse, DeFi, NFTs and beyond
Security and privacy in AI systems
Visualization for AI and Web3 analytics
Analysis and design of enterprise applications in UML
Legal issues in artificial intelligence and data science
Topic in computer network and systems

courseGroups.name: Capstone Experience
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete either COMP7705 Project or COMP7706 Computing technology practicum (12 credits), related to the Cyber Security Stream. The stream relationship and mutually exclusive choice require manual audit review.
